properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Allowed origins for CORS requests. This property should be a comma-separated list of allowed origins.

properties.name: api.security.token.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing and verifying JWT tokens. This property should be set to a secure value.

properties.name: spring.mail.host
properties.description: SMTP server host address for sending emails (e.g., smtp.gmail.com, mail.example.com)

properties.name: spring.mail.port
properties.description: SMTP server port number for sending emails (e.g., 587 for TLS, 465 for SSL, 25 for plain text)
